title: Lane 4 route replay and support depth
summary: Deepen route-local replay and tiny support readability through existing route, world-state, process, and support seams.

execution_order.goal: Scope one route-local replay or support-depth pass.
execution_order.why_now: Held Dune proved the seam; the next pass can broaden the pattern carefully.

execution_order.goal: Implement the scoped replay/support depth pass.
execution_order.why_now: Routes should feel alive without becoming a separate replay system.

execution_order.goal: Review replay/support depth for clarity, save stability, and no loadout drift.
execution_order.why_now: Support readability should stay tiny and route-facing.

completion_gate: One replay/support depth improvement lands through existing route seams.
Canonical filed identities and save behavior remain stable.
No new replay system, loadout UI, station shell, geometry, or content pack lands.
guardrails: No save schema change unless scout proves unavoidable.

scout_497_contract.decision: Implement a tiny Held Dune support-depth pass by giving the existing source-to-shore-dune-catch processFocus active hand-lens carriers.
runtime_scope: Add activeSlotEntryIdsBySlotId for source-to-shore-dune-catch.processFocus in src/engine/field-request-catalog.ts.
Use beach-grass for the dune-catch slot and pacific-wax-myrtle for the swale-hold slot.
Do not add a cool-edge active carrier because sand-capture is not a forest-edge process.
test_scope: Prove getHandLensNotebookFit/prefersHandLensActiveRouteEntry prefers Held Dune carriers through the existing route controller seam.
Re-run Source to Shore station/snapshot guards to confirm ready/filed Dune Catch identity stays canonical.
exclusions: No route ids, evidence ids, ordered slots, filed text, support ids, save schema, replay framework, loadout UI, station shell, geometry, content pack, or fourth Source to Shore beat.

main_497_result.summary: Added active hand-lens carrier preferences for the existing Held Dune process window while preserving canonical Dune Catch ready/filed identity.
verification: npm test -- --run src/test/field-requests.test.ts -t "Source to Shore|Held Dune"
npm test -- --run src/test/field-request-controller.test.ts -t "Source to Shore|Held Dune|support notice"
npm test -- --run src/test/field-season-board.test.ts -t "Source to Shore|Dune Catch|Held Dune"
npm test -- --run src/test/save-snapshots.test.ts -t "Source to Shore|Dune Catch"
npm test -- --run src/test/field-request-catalog.test.ts src/test/field-requests.test.ts src/test/field-request-controller.test.ts src/test/field-season-board.test.ts src/test/save-snapshots.test.ts

critic_497_result.summary: Held Dune support-depth stayed inside the existing process-focus hand-lens seam; Dune Catch ready/filed identity, Source to Shore beat count, save shape, support ids, station shell, and route framework remain stable.
verification: npm test -- --run src/test/field-request-catalog.test.ts src/test/field-requests.test.ts src/test/field-request-controller.test.ts src/test/field-season-board.test.ts src/test/save-snapshots.test.ts

post_packet_path: If clean, proceed to notebook filing synthesis.
If content is needed, hand it to lane 2.
